settings.heading: Frequently asked questions
settings.text: Everything you need to feel ready for your glow.

settings.question: How should I prepare?
settings.answer: Exfoliate 24 hours before and arrive with clean, product-free skin.

settings.question: What should I wear?
settings.answer: Loose, dark, comfortable clothing. Avoid tight straps and jeans.

settings.question: Which products help extend my tan?
settings.answer: Our Tan Extender, Body Wash, and Body Exfoliant work together to maintain your glow.

settings.question: How do memberships work?
settings.answer: Memberships have a 3-month minimum and require 30 days written notice to cancel. Tans do not roll over. Memberships can be frozen for a $10 monthly fee.

settings.question: Is your formula safe?
settings.answer: Our DHA formulas are eco-certified, paraben-free, alcohol-free and cruelty-free.
